description: Request body to approve a proposal for execution (POST /v1/proposals/{id}/approve, proposals_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). 'approval_authority' is required — records who/what granted the approval.

approval_authority.description: Identity or role that granted approval (e.g. 'governor', 'ci_gate'). Recorded on the proposal row.
